scope.summary: Emit Strict-Transport-Security only from native TLS listeners bound beyond loopback, including streamed SSE responses.
out_of_scope: TLS termination performed by an upstream reverse proxy.

entry_points.name: native HTTPS listener
entry_points.trace: http::tests::non_loopback_native_https_sets_hsts proves the header is present for a 0.0.0.0 native TLS listener and the existing loopback handshake test proves it is absent on loopback. http::sse_writer::tests::streaming_headers_emit_hsts_only_when_requested covers streamed SSE headers.

limitations: The focused tests use self-signed local TLS and do not exercise a production reverse proxy.
